stemHtml: Which of these statements concerning propellers is correct?

options.a: The blade angle of a feathered propeller is approximately 0 degrees.
options.b: The blade angle of a feathered propeller is approximately 180 degrees.
options.c: A windmilling propeller causes less drag than a feathered propeller.
options.d: When compared with a non-feathered propeller, a feathered propeller improves the handling of a multi-engine aeroplane with one engine inoperative.
